description: Fix background cache handlers to correctly handle browser tool permission changes. handleBgSetToolPermission and handleBgSetAllToolsPermission search cache.plugins for 'browser' which doesn't exist — browser tools live in cache.browserTools. The pending optimistic update infrastructure (addPendingBrowserToolUpdate, reapplyPendingOptimisticUpdates) already exists but is never used by these handlers.

userStories.title: Fix handleBgSetToolPermission to handle plugin='browser' via cache.browserTools
userStories.description: handleBgSetToolPermission searches cache.plugins for 'browser', finds nothing, and the optimistic cache update, pending overlay, and error rollback are all no-ops. Add a conditional branch for plugin='browser' that operates on cache.browserTools and uses addPendingBrowserToolUpdate/removePendingBrowserToolUpdate.
acceptanceCriteria: handleBgSetToolPermission for plugin='browser' captures the original permission from cache.browserTools
handleBgSetToolPermission for plugin='browser' optimistically updates cache.browserTools
handleBgSetToolPermission for plugin='browser' uses addPendingBrowserToolUpdate and removePendingBrowserToolUpdate
handleBgSetToolPermission for plugin='browser' error rollback reverts cache.browserTools to the original permission
Existing plugin tool permission handling (plugin!='browser') is unchanged

userStories.title: Fix handleBgSetAllToolsPermission to handle plugin='browser' via cache.browserTools
userStories.description: handleBgSetAllToolsPermission has the same structural issue as handleBgSetToolPermission for plugin='browser'. Add a conditional branch that operates on cache.browserTools and uses addPendingAllBrowserToolsUpdate/removePendingAllBrowserToolsUpdate.
acceptanceCriteria: handleBgSetAllToolsPermission for plugin='browser' captures original permissions from cache.browserTools
handleBgSetAllToolsPermission for plugin='browser' optimistically updates all browser tools in cache.browserTools
handleBgSetAllToolsPermission for plugin='browser' uses addPendingAllBrowserToolsUpdate and removePendingAllBrowserToolsUpdate
handleBgSetAllToolsPermission for plugin='browser' error rollback reverts cache.browserTools to original permissions
Existing plugin all-tools permission handling (plugin!='browser') is unchanged
